phase: Phase 21: FX + Liquidity Drivers and Six/Seven-Driver Economic Capital
task: Phase 21 Task 2 - Six-driver out-of-sample LSMC proxy validation (FX included)

notes: FX-mode head-to-head (best OOS RMSE): analytic offset 4686.04 vs learned hexavariate 4757.11 — the control-variate design dominates the fully-learned FX axis at this educational scale.
Proxy and nested capital are evaluated on the SAME eval outer states (seed 141), so the comparison isolates pure surface error; the nested benchmark uses 96 heavy inner Q-paths per state.
FX-axis recovery: surface partial-FX slope -3846.15 vs CIP-exact theoretical -3846.15 (rel err 0.00%).

use_restrictions.classification: EDUCATIONAL ONLY — six-driver proxy-model validation evidence, not a regulatory sign-off
use_restrictions.what_it_validates: Out-of-sample skill of the Phase 21 HEXAVARIATE (G2++ rate + equity + credit-spread + lapse-behaviour + mortality-trend + FX-translation) LSMC capital surface against high-accuracy nested truth on an independent, disjoint-seed hold-out, with the basis (polynomial degree AND capped higher-order interaction order) selected by OOS error, plus an explicit FX-axis recovery check against the CIP-exact analytic FX leg.
use_restrictions.heavy_target_caveat: Validation targets are nested Monte-Carlo estimates with n_inner_heavy paths; they are accurate but not exact. OOS R^2/RMSE carry residual inner Monte-Carlo error ~1/sqrt(n_inner_heavy).
use_restrictions.selection_caveat: Basis selection minimises OOS error over the swept (degree, max_interaction_order) grid only; the true optimum may lie outside the grid. Valid only over the fitted 6-D interquartile state region — extrapolation is unsupported.
use_restrictions.residual_risk: The FX leg is a single linear translation exposure with CIP-exact conditioning — real books carry optioned / partially hedged FX with smile and regime (peg) dynamics outside this surface. Liquidity risk remains outside the proxy (Phase 21 Task 3). The five-driver inner nest is the governed HW1F nest conditioned at the realised G2++ r_H (Phase 20 residual). Parameters are illustrative placeholders; capital magnitudes are NOT calibrated.
use_restrictions.governance: Independent APS X2 review pending; production sign-off withheld. Use only for education, methodology demonstration, and testing.

chosen by oos_rmse across BOTH fx modes and the full basis grid.

## Capital comparison (selected surface vs nested benchmark, same eval states)

## FX-axis recovery

* Proxy and nested capital are evaluated on the SAME eval outer states (seed 141), so the comparison isolates pure surface error; the nested benchmark uses 96 heavy inner Q-paths per state.
